title: US and Iran 'very close' to deal but 'not there yet', Vance says
summary_full: US officials earlier told the BBC that the framework of a ceasefire extension deal had been agreed, pending the approval of Trump and Iran's leadership.
summary_public: US officials earlier told the BBC that the framework of a ceasefire extension deal had been agreed, pending the approval of Trump and Iran's leadership.

IR.label: positive
IR.evidence: US and Iran 'very close' to deal
